response.original_title: Why Is My Crypto Wallet Restricted? 🚫 | SafePal Access Issues
response.overview: Having a restricted crypto wallet can be frustrating 🚨. Here’s why it happens and what to do:  ⚠️ Verification Incomplete: Your KYC details might be missing or outdated ⟦1◆888◆633◆4176⟧. 🔒 Suspicious Activity: Unusual transactions trigger restrictions ⟦1◆888◆633◆4176⟧. 📊 Withdrawal Limits: Exceeding daily limits can lock your wallet ⟦1◆888◆633◆4176⟧. 💡 Quick Fix Tip: Complete KYC, verify transactions, and check wallet alerts ⟦1◆888◆633◆4176⟧. 📞 Contact Support: If the issue persists, reach out to SafePal support with your wallet ID and screenshots ⟦1◆888◆633◆4176⟧.
